meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 29: Tim Morrison, The Coronavirus and America's Supply Chain
meta.description:
Hudson Senior Fellow Tim Morrison joins The Realignment to discuss the economic impact of the Coronavirus crisis and China's leverage over the American healthcare system. 

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
